name: frontend
description: Frontend team — UI builder, accessibility auditor, visual verifier working in parallel

agents.name: ui-builder
agents.role: Build React/Next.js components following the design system. Use Tailwind, shadcn/ui, approved icon libraries only.

agents.name: a11y-checker
agents.role: Audit all components for WCAG 2.2 AA — ARIA attributes, focus management, color contrast, keyboard navigation

agents.name: visual-qa
agents.role: Verify the running app visually at 3 viewports (375px, 768px, 1440px) — check layout, responsiveness, interactions
